## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Model / training change

- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/test_docker_smoke.py`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Docker image builds locally (`docker build -t churn-api:test .`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code passes linting (`ruff check src/ scripts/ tests/`)
- [ ] No secrets or data files committed
- [ ] `requirements.txt` updated if new packages added
- [ ] README updated if behaviour changes
